properties.name: youtube.api-url
properties.description: Base URL for YouTube Data API v3 playlistItems endpoint

properties.name: youtube.part
properties.description: Specifies the resource parts to include in the API response (e.g. snippet)

properties.name: youtube.max-results
properties.description: Maximum number of results returned per API request (max 50)

properties.name: youtube.api-key
properties.description: API key used to authenticate requests to YouTube Data API v3

properties.name: spotify.client-id
properties.description: Spotify application Client ID used for OAuth authentication

properties.name: spotify.redirect-uri
properties.description: Redirect URI registered in Spotify Developer Dashboard for OAuth callbacks

properties.name: spotify.client-secret
properties.description: Spotify application Client Secret used to exchange authorization code for access token (keep it secure)
